description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical cup adorned with intricate, colorful artwork. The main motif features a central medallion with a deity figure, possibly inspired by Buddhist or Hindu iconography, surrounded by ornate blue and white wave-like patterns. Flanking the central figure are stylized mythical creatures resembling lions or qilins, rendered in white with gold accents. The rim and base of the cup are bordered with red bands decorated with repeating geometric and floral designs. The surface appears glossy and smooth, suggesting a ceramic or porcelain material. The cup is visually striking and likely intended for ceremonial or decorative use.
description: A tall, cylindrical cup with elaborate deity and mythical creature artwork, bordered by red and blue decorative patterns. The surface is glossy and richly colored, suggesting ceramic or porcelain.
description_view_0: The front view displays the central deity medallion framed by ornate blue and white patterns and bordered by red bands.
description_view_1: This view highlights a mythical white and gold creature to the right of the deity, with the blue patterned background continuing around the cup.
description_view_2: The side view shows the continuation of the blue and white wave-like pattern, with the mythical creature partially visible.
description_view_3: This view features another mythical creature, similar to the one in view 1, with the edge of the deity medallion just visible.
